name: Tarte
tagline: Bread baked fresh every morning — pastries, breakfast, sandwiches & coffee.
footerBlurb: Homemade pastries, hot breakfast, sandwiches on bread we bake daily, and coffee in every style — on Middletown Road since 2025.

features.title: Pastries
features.desc: What we're known for. We bake our own bread fresh every morning, from recipes developed over years and made with care.

features.title: Breakfast
features.desc: Served hot and fresh every morning, made with real ingredients — the way a morning should start.

features.title: Sandwiches
features.desc: Built on our homemade bread, freshly baked daily, and stacked to order.

features.title: Coffee
features.desc: All types — espresso, lattes, cold brew, and seasonal specialties, brewed all day.

specialties.title: Signature Pastries
specialties.caption: Croissants, tarts, and morning bakes — the thing we're known for, made with care.

specialties.title: Fresh-Baked Bread
specialties.caption: We bake our own bread fresh every morning, from recipes years in the making.

specialties.title: Hot Breakfast
specialties.caption: Eggs, omelets, and pancakes served hot and fresh with real ingredients.

specialties.title: Homemade Sandwiches
specialties.caption: Burgers, Philly steaks, and wraps built on bread we bake daily.

specialties.title: Coffee, Every Way
specialties.caption: Espresso, lattes, cortados, and seasonal specialties brewed all day.

specialties.title: Cold & Iced
specialties.caption: Freddo, cold brew, and iced lattes for the warmer afternoons.

storyTeaser: I’ve always dreamed of building something of my own, a place that reflects who we are and the experiences we want to share. Opening this coffee shop is more than starting a business. It’s about creating a welcoming space where people can slow down, connect, and enjoy great coffee and fresh pastries.

The name Tarte has a special meaning to us. It’s my wife’s favorite dessert, and from the moment she told me, I knew it would one day become the name of our shop. It represents warmth, comfort, and the little moments that bring people together.

Every cup we serve and every pastry we bake is our way of saying thank you to the community that supports us. We hope Tarte becomes a place where familiar faces feel at home, new friendships begin, and every visit leaves you looking forward to the next.
aboutProse: I’ve always dreamed of building something of my own, a place that reflects who we are and the experiences we want to share. Opening this coffee shop is more than starting a business. It’s about creating a welcoming space where people can slow down, connect, and enjoy great coffee and fresh pastries.

The name Tarte has a special meaning to us. It’s my wife’s favorite dessert, and from the moment she told me, I knew it would one day become the name of our shop. It represents warmth, comfort, and the little moments that bring people together.

Every cup we serve and every pastry we bake is our way of saying thank you to the community that supports us. We hope Tarte becomes a place where familiar faces feel at home, new friendships begin, and every visit leaves you looking forward to the next.
